purpose: Map rows in docs/matrix/speccheck-matrix-v2.md to Complement black-box test evidence.
notes: Complement is the primary behavior and interoperability evidence source, not the primary checklist completeness source.
Out-of-repo Complement supports client-server and multi-homeserver tests directly.
Mock federation server support is not generally available out-of-repo, so some federation-heavy evidence may require an adapter image, a local fork, or upstream integration work.
rowsById is the canonical machine-readable map. Legacy rows-by-title data has been retired.

tests.why: Covers 404 for unknown endpoints and 405 for unsupported methods.

cs-core-web-browser-clients.title: Web browser clients
cs-core-web-browser-clients.notes: Not explicitly covered in complement-analysis.md test runs.

cs-core-server-discovery.title: Server discovery
cs-core-server-discovery.notes: `TestVersionStructure` covers `/versions`; `.well-known` and auth metadata still need explicit evidence

tests.why: Covers /_matrix/client/versions response shape and advertised version values.

cs-core-client-authentication.title: Client authentication
cs-core-client-authentication.notes: Login/logout/change-password/deactivate/refresh-token flows have csapi tests; registration and login-token coverage still incomplete

tests.why: Covers password login behavior and /whoami after login.
Covers logout semantics.
Covers password change behavior.
Covers account deactivation behavior.
Covers refresh-token use via the client transaction ID flow.

cs-core-capabilities-negotiation.notes: Not explicitly covered in complement-analysis.md test runs.

Covers filter creation and sync filter application.
Exercises a filtered sync edge case involving state changes.

cs-core-events.title: Events
cs-core-events.notes: Basic send/recv passing; size limits pass (`TestEventSizeLimits`)

tests.why: Exercises sync/timeline behavior under a state-change edge case.
Covers timestamp-to-event retrieval behavior.

Covers account data updates for m.direct.
